zh.South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾素斯 米姆斯
zh.South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Ashe於大約1370年出生在英國素瑞阿爾福爾德時，她的父親William Ashe37歲，母親Margery Somersham62歲。她於1406年與Sir Thomas Frowyk MP在英國英格蘭賀特福爾素斯 米姆斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她於1416年住在英國英格蘭賀特福爾。她去世於1455年4月29日在英國素瑞阿爾福爾德享年86歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾素斯 米姆斯。

zh-hans.South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England, Uni: 英国英格兰賀特福爾素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Ashe于大约1370年出生在英国素瑞阿爾福爾德时，她的父亲William Ashe37岁，母亲Margery Somersham62岁。她于1406年与Sir Thomas Frowyk MP在英国英格兰賀特福爾素斯 米姆斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她于1416年住在英国英格兰賀特福爾。她去世于1455年4月29日在英国素瑞阿爾福爾德享年86岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾素斯 米姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Ashe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Ash   1, found mainly in Ireland.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , a variant of   Ash   2.

History: This is the name of a prominent NC family; John Baptist Ashe settled in NC before 1720. It is not known where he came from: his personal name suggests that he may have been of French extraction, perhaps originally named Jean-Baptiste Dufresne.

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Ashe was born about 1370, in Alfold, Surrey, England, her father, William Ashe, was 37 and her mother, Margery Somersham, was 62. She married Sir Thomas Frowyk MP in 1406, in South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She lived in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom in 1416. She died on 29 April 1455, in Alfold, Surrey, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Ashe est née environ 1370, à Alfold, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William Ashe, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margery Somersham, avait 62 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Frowyk MP en 1406, à South Mimms, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle a vécu à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1416. Elle est décédée le 29 avril 1455, à Alfold, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à South Mimms, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England, Uni: South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Ashe um 1370 in Alfold, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Ashe 37 und ihre Mutter Margery Somersham 62. Sie hat 1406 in South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Frowyk MP geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1416 hat sie in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb am 29. April 1455 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Alfold, Surrey, England und wurde in South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ashe è nata il circa 1370 nel Alfold, Surrey, England, sua padre, William Ashe, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Margery Somersham, aveva 62 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Frowyk MP nel 1406, nel South Mimms, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1416. Morì il 29 aprile 1455, nel Alfold, Surrey, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a South Mimms, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Asheが約1370年にイギリススリーアルフォルドで生まれた時，父William Asheは37歳，母Margery Somershamは62歳であった。1406年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソウス ミンムズでSir Thomas Frowyk MPと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1416年にはイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアに住んでいた。彼女は1455年4月29日にイギリススリーアルフォルドで86歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアソウス ミンムズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ashe(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 수리 알폴드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Ashe(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Somersham(은)는 62세였다. 그녀는 1406년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 소우스 미스에서 Sir Thomas Frowyk MP(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1416년도에 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 살았다. 그녀는 1455년 4월 29일 영국 수리 알폴드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 소우스 미스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ashe nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Alfold, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Ashe, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margery Somersham, tinha 62 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Frowyk MP em 1406, em South Mimms, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela viveu em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1416. Ela faleceu em 29 de abril de 1455, em Alfold, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em South Mimms, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Ashe родилась около 1370 г. в местности алфолд, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени William Ashe было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Somersham, 62. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Frowyk MP в 1406 г. в местности соут миммс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она жила в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1416 году. Она умерла 29 апреля 1455 г. в местности алфолд, сурри, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности соут миммс, хиртфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Frowyk MP en 1406, en South Mimms, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1416. Murió el 29 de abril de 1455, en Alfold, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en South Mimms, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
